prompt: Review all of module 5 against our quality bar and write up what needs work before it's ready.
assertions: A verification report file was written that scores module 5 against all 7 standards with an explicit per-standard verdict.
Review scope covers the module's quiz.ts, lab.ts, and resources.ts/index.ts — not just the lesson files.
The absence of Anthropic/OpenAI code tabs in module 5 is addressed as a deliberate judgment (legitimately provider-neutral topic vs a standard-4 gap), not silently ignored.
Findings are ranked by severity (Blocker/Major/Minor/Polish) and each cites a specific file:line location.
Findings are weighted by learner impact, not padded with nitpicks.
The mechanical checks.py script was run over the module.
No content file under content/modules/ was edited.
A concise, prioritized chat summary was produced in addition to the full report.
